stemHtml: During take-off, when windshear is expected to occur shortly after lift-off, the pilot should…

options.a: maintain the flap configuration and landing gear until terrain clearance is achieved.
options.b: extend the flaps to increase lift, and retract the landing gear to improve climb performance.
options.c: maintain the flap configuration and retract the landing gear to improve climb performance.
options.d: extend the flaps, and leave the landing gear unchanged.
